mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.sku_id AS skuId, s.product_id AS productId, p.name AS productName, s.sku_name AS skuName, p.cover_url AS coverUrl, s.price, c.quantity, s.stock, c.selected, s.price * c.quantity AS subtotal FROM cart_item c INNER JOIN sku s ON c.sku_id = s.id INNER JOIN product p ON s.product_id = p.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_item (user_id, sku_id, quantity, selected) VALUES (#{userId}, #{skuId}, #{quantity}, #{selected})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND selected = 1
